presets.name: Classic Masthead
presets.background: glossy magazine cover, studio portrait of the cover subject on a seamless backdrop, professional editorial lighting

boxes.desc: magazine masthead / logo, bold condensed sans-serif spanning the full top margin, slightly overlapped by the subject's head for depth
issue date / dek strip set in small caps just beneath the masthead
cover subject (person or product), framed waist-up and centered, eyes on the upper third line, gaze toward camera
primary cover line, large display type stacked along the left margin, the most important headline on the cover
secondary cover lines, three or four smaller stacked headlines running down the right rail, each with a colored kicker
barcode and price block tucked into the bottom-right safe corner

presets.name: Fashion Full-Bleed
presets.background: full-bleed high-fashion editorial photograph filling the entire frame, dramatic single-source lighting, shallow depth of field

boxes.desc: full-bleed fashion subject filling the frame edge to edge, confident pose, cropped close
oversized thin-serif masthead spanning the top, partially occluded by the subject for an immersive feel
single bold cover line anchored in the lower-left, high contrast against the photo
thin tagline / contributor credit under the cover line
small barcode in the bottom-right safe corner

presets.name: Minimalist
presets.background: minimalist design magazine cover, generous negative space, muted solid background, single centered subject

boxes.desc: small understated masthead in the top-left corner, light-weight type
issue number set small in the top-right corner
single centered subject or still-life object surrounded by calm negative space
one quiet cover line centered along the bottom, plenty of letter-spacing

presets.name: Newsstand (Cover-Line Heavy)
presets.background: busy newsstand magazine cover, brightly lit subject, saturated colors designed to pop on a shelf

boxes.desc: loud bold masthead spanning the top edge, high-saturation color
celebrity subject centered, energetic expression, lit to separate cleanly from the cover lines
biggest cover line, upper-left, with a bright highlight box behind it
stack of secondary cover lines down the left rail, mixed sizes, colored kickers
stack of teasers and pull-quotes down the right rail, page-number flags
barcode, price and issue date in the bottom-left safe corner
